Agent Jido (https://agentjido.xyz) is a site for building reliable multi-agent systems on Elixir/OTP.

Preferred retrieval
- Send `Accept: text/markdown` on public content routes.
- Canonical markdown negotiation routes:
  - /
  - /docs*
  - /blog*
  - /ecosystem*
  - /features*
  - /build*
  - /community*
  - /getting-started
  - /examples*

Primary content hubs
- Docs: https://agentjido.xyz/docs
- Blog: https://agentjido.xyz/blog
- Ecosystem: https://agentjido.xyz/ecosystem
- Features: https://agentjido.xyz/features
- Build: https://agentjido.xyz/build
- Community: https://agentjido.xyz/community
- Examples: https://agentjido.xyz/examples

Discovery
- Sitemap: https://agentjido.xyz/sitemap.xml
- Feed: https://agentjido.xyz/feed

Rendered fallback pattern
- If direct source markdown is unavailable, use:
  - https://markdown.new/https://agentjido.xyz/<route>
